DecimalFormat.imports:
from decimal import Decimal, getcontext
import locale
locale.setlocale(locale.LC_ALL, '')
getcontext().prec = 10

body: assertNull("US Locale, DE Format", strictValidator.parse(testStringDE, null, Locale.US));
"DE Locale, US Format", strictValidator.parse(testStringUS, null, Locale.GERMAN));
assertNull("Default Locale, DE Format", strictValidator.parse(testStringDE, null, null));
assertEquals("US Locale, US Format", "1,234.5", strictValidator.format2(number, Locale.US));
translation: self.assertEqual("US Locale, US Format", "1,234.5", self._strictValidator.format2(number, locale.US))
self.assertEqual("DE Locale, DE Format", "1.234,5", self._strictValidator.format2(number, locale.GERMAN))

body: assertTrue("isInRange() in range", strictValidator.isInRange(number11, number10, number20));
translation: self.assertTrue("isInRange() in range", self._strictValidator.isInRange(number11, number10, number20))
